metadata.title: Vaelrix - Face of the Enderman
metadata.thumbnail_concept: A shadowy Vaelrix silhouette with glowing purple Enderman eyes, fractured obsidian skin, and a warped Minecraft-inspired void portal behind him. High contrast, eerie, readable at mobile size.
metadata.niche: gaming music / dark rap / Minecraft-inspired cinematic lyric visualizer

narrative.hook_script: They said don't look it in the eyes. But I did. Now the void knows my name, and every block I break sounds like something breaking inside me.
narrative.core_conflict: Vaelrix becomes the Face of the Enderman, caught between human pain and void-born transformation. The video asks whether staring into the monster turns you into it, or reveals what was already there.
narrative.call_to_action: At 95%, after the final void-glitch blackout, display: 'Subscribe before the portal closes.'

segments.action: Cold open on black screen with distant teleport sounds. Purple eyes flicker open. Vaelrix silhouette appears inside a broken obsidian frame as the hook begins.
segments.b_roll: Glitching Enderman eyes, block particles, purple static, close-up typography synced to syllables.

segments.action: Establish the transformation: Vaelrix walks through a corrupted overworld where trees bend toward him and shadows stretch like arms.
segments.b_roll: Minecraft-inspired terrain, corrupted grass blocks, floating obsidian shards, slow camera drift.

segments.action: The first lyrical escalation. Each bar causes the environment to fracture. The Enderman presence becomes less external and more mirrored in Vaelrix himself.
segments.b_roll: Word impacts crack the screen, purple waveform pulses, teleport cuts between overworld and End dimension.

segments.action: Mid-song descent. The visualizer enters the void. Vaelrix faces dozens of Enderman figures that copy his movements like a chorus of shadow selves.
segments.b_roll: Floating islands, chorus fruit glow, mirrored silhouettes, low-gravity camera rotation.

segments.action: The beat intensifies. Vaelrix stops running and stares directly into the camera. The Enderman eyes become his eyes.
segments.b_roll: Aggressive kinetic typography, rapid portal flashes, purple-black energy tearing across the frame.

segments.action: Final confrontation. The human and Enderman forms overlap until the audience cannot tell which one is original.
segments.b_roll: Split-face composition, obsidian crown motif, bass-synced screen distortion, particle storms.

segments.action: The music drops into a final eerie tail. Vaelrix disappears, leaving only the glowing eyes in darkness. CTA appears after the last teleport sound.
segments.b_roll: Void blackout, lingering purple eyes, final title card, subscribe prompt.
